zh.lifeSummary: 當Eóghan John Macdougall於1316年出生在蘇格蘭阿吉爾奧班時，他的父親Sir John MacDougall 5th of Dunollie and of Lorn,  "Iain MacDhùghaill", "Eóin Bacach"47歲，母親Dornagilla MacLachlan44歲。他於1362年與Joanna Jonet Isaac de Ergadia在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1388年4月29日在蘇格蘭培爾享年72歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eóghan John Macdougall于1316年出生在苏格兰阿吉爾奧班时，他的父亲Sir John MacDougall 5th of Dunollie and of Lorn,  "Iain MacDhùghaill", "Eóin Bacach"47岁，母亲Dornagilla MacLachlan44岁。他于1362年与Joanna Jonet Isaac de Ergadia在英国苏格兰阿吉爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1388年4月29日在苏格兰培爾享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: Macdougall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McDougall
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Dubhghaill, ‘son of Dubhghall’, a personal name composed of the elements dubh ‘black’ + gall ‘stranger’. This was originally a byname used to distinguish the darker-haired Danes from the fair-haired Norwegians. Compare McDowell and Doyle .

nameMeanings.name: Eóghan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name, supposedly derived from iúr ‘yew’ and meaning ‘born of yew’. It was borne in Irish legend by one of the two sons of Niall of the Nine Hostages.

variants.name: Euan
meanings: Anglicized form of Scottish Gaelic Eóghan, now also bestowed by parents without Scottish connections.

variants.name: Ewan
meanings: The usual Anglicized form in Scotland and Northern Ireland of Gaelic Eóghan . It is also found in northern England from the 14th century onwards, and since the late 1990s has been one of the Gaelic names that enjoy wider currency.

variants.name: Evan
meanings: As a Welsh name this represents an Anglicized form of Iefan , a later development of Ieuan . As a Scottish name it is a variant of Euan . It is now used throughout the English-speaking world.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Eóghan John Macdougall was born in 1316, in Oban, Argyll, Scotland, his father, Sir John MacDougall 5th of Dunollie and of Lorn,  "Iain MacDhùghaill", "Eóin Bacach", was 47 and his mother, Dornagilla MacLachlan, was 44. He married Joanna Jonet Isaac de Ergadia in 1362, in Argyll, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died on 29 April 1388, in Perthshire, Scotland, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eóghan John Macdougall est né en 1316, à Oban, Argyll, Écosse, son père, Sir John MacDougall 5th of Dunollie and of Lorn,  "Iain MacDhùghaill", "Eóin Bacach", avait 47 ans et sa mère, Dornagilla MacLachlan, avait 44 ans. Il a épousé Joanna Jonet Isaac d’Ergadia en 1362, à Argyll, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 29 avril 1388, à Perthshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eóghan John Macdougall 1316 in Oban, Argyll, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John MacDougall 5th of Dunollie and of Lorn,  "Iain MacDhùghaill", "Eóin Bacach" 47 und seine Mutter Dornagilla MacLachlan 44. Er hat 1362 in Argyll, Schottland, United Kingdom Joanna Jonet Isaac de Ergadia geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 29. April 1388 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Perthshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eóghan John Macdougall è nato il nel 1316 nel Oban, Argyll, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir John MacDougall 5th of Dunollie and of Lorn,  "Iain MacDhùghaill", "Eóin Bacach", aveva 47 anni e il suo madre, Dornagilla MacLachlan, aveva 44 anni. Lui sposato Joanna Jonet Isaac de Ergadia nel 1362, nel Argyll, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 29 aprile 1388, nel Perthshire, Scotland, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Eóghan John Macdougallが1316年にスコットランドアルグイルオバンで生まれた時，父Sir John MacDougall 5th of Dunollie and of Lorn,  "Iain MacDhùghaill", "Eóin Bacach"は47歳，母Dornagilla MacLachlanは44歳であった。1362年にイギリススコットランドアルグイルでJoanna Jonet Isaac de Ergadiaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1388年4月29日にスコットランドペルスシュアイアで72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eóghan John Macdougall(이)가 1316년 스컷랜드 아그이 오반에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John MacDougall 5th of Dunollie and of Lorn,  "Iain MacDhùghaill", "Eóin Bacach"(은)는 47세였고, 그의 어머니 Dornagilla MacLachlan(은)는 44세였다. 그는 1362년 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이에서 Joanna Jonet Isaac de Ergadia(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1388년 4월 29일 스컷랜드 퍼스실르에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eóghan John Macdougall nasceu em 1316, em Oban, Argyll, Scotland, seu pai, Sir John MacDougall 5th of Dunollie and of Lorn,  "Iain MacDhùghaill", "Eóin Bacach", tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Dornagilla MacLachlan, tinha 44 anos. Ele casou-se com Joanna Jonet Isaac de Ergadia em 1362, em Argyll, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eóghan John Macdougall родился в 1316 г. в местности обань, аргилл, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir John MacDougall 5th of Dunollie and of Lorn,  "Iain MacDhùghaill", "Eóin Bacach" было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Dornagilla MacLachlan, 44. Он женился на женщине по имени Joanna Jonet Isaac de Ergadia в 1362 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер 29 апреля 1388 г. в местности пиртшир, Шотландия в возрасте 72 лет.

Se casó con Joanna Jonet Isaac de Ergadia en 1362, en Argyll, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas.
